text:
Once upon a time in a village near a dense forest, there was an enchanted well. Every evening, a small white rabbit would fill a glass cup with sparkling water from the well and drink it.

One particular night, the rabbit decided to sit by the well and muse upon life. "These waters are the best," the rabbit thought, raising the cup. "They remind me that there's always sunshine beyond this dark forest."

Suddenly, a peculiar shadow rolled across the pond. It was a sleek owl with curious eyes. The rabbit listened intently as the owl sipped from its cup.

"The world's full of wonders," said the owl in a soft hoot. "How do you like your coffee?"

"It's just water," replied the rabbit, mildly disappointed.

"Well," the owl considered, taking another sip, "there's always something interesting out there. Don't stop looking."

The owl flew away with the cup, still talking. The rabbit giggled to itself.

Every day,
